ad.name: Doctor Said Everything's Normal
ad.hook_line: my doctor said 'everything looks normal' for the third time

storyboard: 0-3s  → HOOK: Couch, defeated/exhausted, frustration → determination shift
3-7s  → BODY: Hands opening test kit, unboxing, showing simplicity
7-11s → PROOF: Reading results on phone, vindication/surprise
11-13s → RESULT: Better version of herself, kitchen, energized
13-15s → CTA: Holding test kit, confident recommendation

shots.name: Couch Frustration — Defeated
shots.what_this_is: Frame A. She's on the couch, exhausted and frustrated. Doctor just dismissed her again
shots.text_overlay: my doctor said 'everything looks normal' for the third time

prompt.reference_images: Attached: Bea avatar reference for face identity
prompt.subject: Same woman from avatar reference. KEY IDENTITY MARKERS: white/grey streak left temple, chin scar, asymmetric brows. Hair in messy bun. No makeup. MATCH ATTACHED REFERENCE
prompt.apparel: Oversized hoodie or cardigan, something she grabbed to wrap herself in on the couch. Comfort clothes. Maybe a blanket edge visible near her
prompt.expression: Tired frustration. NOT crying, NOT dramatic. Just TIRED of not having answers. Under-eye circles prominent. Lips pressed together (holding back emotion). Brow slightly furrowed. Looking at camera with exhausted directness. 'You know what I mean' energy
prompt.scene: Living room couch. Evening-ish light. She's sitting/leaning against cushions. Blanket or pillow nearby. Cozy but defeated energy

camera.framing: Head and shoulders. Selfie distance from couch. Slightly below eye level (phone propped or held low). 9:16 vertical

prompt.lighting: Warm but dim living room light. Table lamp or TV glow. Evening 'I've given up for today' light. Shadows under cheekbones

shots.output_becomes: C009-01.jpg → Use as Frame A reference for C009-02

shots.name: Couch Determination — 'Fine, I'll Do It Myself'
shots.what_this_is: Frame B. Same couch scene, expression shifts from defeated to determined

prompt.reference_images: Attached: Frame A (C009-01). ONLY reference. Generate Frame B from this
prompt.instruction: Starting from attached Frame A, ONLY the expression changes. Everything else stays identical
prompt.expression_change: Slight eye roll transitioning to determination. Jaw sets (muscles tighten along jawline). Eyes narrow slightly — not angry, decisive. A subtle shift from 'defeated' to 'fine, I'll figure it out myself'. Chin lifts 2-3mm. The moment she decides to take testing into her own hands. Expression at 30%
prompt.what_stays_same: Same couch, same clothes, same lighting, same blanket, same framing. ONLY expression changes

shots.name: Unboxing — Hands Opening Kit
shots.what_this_is: POV overhead shot of her hands opening the test kit box. Demystifies the process
shots.text_overlay: so I tested myself. 88 foods. 4 immune pathways. at home.

prompt.reference_images: Attached: (1) Bea reference for skin tone consistency, (2) Product reference for box accuracy
prompt.shot_type: POV OVERHEAD — looking down at a table where her hands are opening the test kit box. Her face is NOT visible. This is a hands-only shot
prompt.hands: Medium brown skin, warm golden undertones matching avatar reference. Black hair tie on right wrist. Short unpolished nails. Both hands in frame — one holding box lid open, one reaching inside
prompt.product_instructions: The test kit box MATCHES ATTACHED REFERENCE — white box, navy INFINITE branding. Box is OPEN, lid flipped back. Inside should look organized and simple — clean compartments, instructional insert visible. The visual message is: this is easy, not intimidating
prompt.surface: Kitchen table or desk. Light wood or white surface. Clean, organized

camera.angle: Directly overhead, looking straight down at the table
camera.DOF: DEEP — hands, box, and surface all sharp
camera.framing: Her hands and the open box fill the frame. 9:16 vertical

prompt.lighting: Bright, clear overhead kitchen/desk light. Everything well-lit and readable

shots.name: Finger Prick Close-Up
shots.what_this_is: Quick shot showing how simple the collection is. Just a finger prick device — tiny, not scary

prompt.reference_images: Attached: Bea reference for skin tone
prompt.shot_type: EXTREME CLOSE-UP of her hand holding a small finger prick lancet device. Clean, medical, not scary. The device should look like a small plastic pen-like object — standard disposable lancet
prompt.hands: Medium brown skin matching reference. One hand holds the lancet near her other hand's fingertip. NOT actually pricking — just showing the device against her finger. About to do it, not during or after
prompt.visual_message: THIS IS EASY. The device is tiny. It's just a small prick. Demystify the process

camera.framing: Extreme close-up of fingers and lancet device. 9:16 vertical

prompt.lighting: Bright, clear. Clean medical feel but in her home, not a lab

shots.name: Results Vindication — 'I KNEW IT'
shots.what_this_is: She's reading results on her phone. Mix of vindication and surprise. 12 sensitivities found
shots.text_overlay: turns out I had 12 food sensitivities my bloodwork never tested for

prompt.subject: Same woman. MATCH ATTACHED REFERENCE. Now in kitchen or at desk, different setting from couch scene. Better lit
prompt.expression: Vindication + surprise. Brows raised (right higher than left per her asymmetry). Eyes wider. Slow nod — the 'I KNEW something was wrong' moment. Mouth forms brief 'o' then closes into a knowing press. Head tilts back slightly. Not anger at doctor — relief at being validated. Expression at 30%
prompt.gaze: Looking down-right (at phone/results) — not at camera
prompt.lighting: Brighter than couch scene. Daytime. Progress in lighting matches progress in story

shots.name: Better Version — Kitchen Morning
shots.what_this_is: The subtle 'after'. Same person but visibly more at ease. Brighter eyes, less tension
shots.text_overlay: 3 weeks later: no more bloating, sleeping through the night

prompt.subject: Same woman. MATCH ATTACHED REFERENCE. Kitchen, morning, making food or holding a mug. She looks BETTER — not dramatically, just subtly more alive
prompt.expression: Genuine energy. Not forced happiness — just the absence of the weight she was carrying. Eyes brighter, under-eye circles slightly less prominent. Shoulders relaxed. Natural half-smile. She's looking at camera with the energy of someone who figured something out
prompt.improvement_notes: This is NOT a dramatic transformation. Same person, same clothes style, same messy bun. The difference is: she looks RESTED. Less puffy. More present. The change should be believable — 3 weeks of avoiding trigger foods, not a makeover

camera.framing: Head and shoulders. Kitchen background. Warm morning light. 9:16 vertical

prompt.lighting: Warm, flattering morning light. The best lighting in the whole ad — she's in a better place now

shots.name: CTA — Confident Recommendation
shots.what_this_is: Holding test kit, warm confident expression. 'You should do this too' without saying it
shots.text_overlay: covered by most insurance · results in 3-5 days · link in bio

prompt.subject: Same woman holding test kit at chest level. MATCH BOTH REFERENCES
prompt.expression: Warm confidence. Not selling — sharing. Genuine half-smile, direct gaze (2 degrees off camera). 'This worked for me' energy
prompt.product_instructions: Box MATCHES ATTACHED PRODUCT REFERENCE. Held naturally at mid-chest. Branding visible

camera.framing: Head, shoulders, product at chest. Kitchen background. 9:16 vertical

prompt.lighting: Warm kitchen light. Bright, positive, but natural

generations_needed: C009-02: C009-01 output → determination shift (Frame B)
C009-03: Avatar ref + Product ref → hands unboxing overhead
C009-04: Avatar ref → finger prick close-up
C009-05: Avatar ref → vindication reading results
C009-07: Avatar ref + Product ref → CTA with product
